title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Kaido, Unknown person #10, Momonosuke, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure living under his regime was miserable, but the order he imposed...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Was the deterrent that kept other predators from targeting your country!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Just bring me "Straw hat" Luffy already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll leave you be after I take his head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's call Luffy and the gang and show this guy who's boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No! That is unaccept- able!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same goes for you, do not touch him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PANT... PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all that time chained up on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You finally have your chance to be free!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is why I refuse to taint your send off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: up until now, I have continued to rely on Luffy, zero, and the others.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it is imperative to prove that those of us who are staying here can repel any enemy on our own!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we still have to depend on the people who wish to leave...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we look any of you in the eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and say that Wano is safe with us?!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke- Kun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now begone, you demon tree!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So you're just a spoiled kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I guess even dragons can be pathetic...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I said leave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AGGHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Waaah! It actually came out!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke- Sama, that was...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It was a spitting image of Kaido's...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: NGGHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BEGONE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BEGONE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hang on, you crazy bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BEGONE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: W/Aaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Amazing! He's managing to control his dragon form?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his aim still leaves much to be desired!!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
